languages.text: Мили атаки по лиане провоцирует бросок на Агилу. Если атакующий его проваливает получает пирсинг урон равный "ненесенный урон по Лиане / 3"

traits.locale_text: Мили атаки по лиане провоцирует бросок на Агилу. Если атакующий его проваливает получает пирсинг урон равный "ненесенный урон по Лиане / 3"

languages.text: Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.
languages.original_text: Мили атаки по лиане провоцирует бросок на Агилу. Если атакующий его проваливает получает пирсинг урон равный "ненесенный урон по Лиане / 3"

traits.locale_text: Any enemy that makes a melee attack against the tree burl must pass an Agility resistance test. If the target fails the test, it suffers <u>(damage dealt to the tree burl / 3)</u> piercing damage.

Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the tree burl must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. If the target fails the {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, it suffers <u>(damage dealt to the tree burl / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

languages.text: Враг, атакующий баррикаду в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g}, должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}. При провале он получает <u>(урон, нанесенный баррикаде / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}пронзающего урона{/g}.

languages.text: Tout ennemi portant une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g} contre la barricade doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g}. En cas d'échec, cet ennemi subit <u>(dégâts infligés à la barricade / 3)</u> points de {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}dégâts perforants{/g}.

languages.text: Barikata {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} gerçekleştiren düşmanlar, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Düşman, testten geçemezse <u>(barikata verilen hasar / 3)</u> kadar {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}delme hasarına{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text: 任何对路障施展{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}的敌人必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若失败，则该敌人受到<u>（对路障造成的伤害/3）</u>点{g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}穿刺伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 任何对路障施展{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}的敌人必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若失败，则该敌人受到<u>（对路障造成的伤害/3）</u>点{g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}穿刺伤害{/g}。

languages.text: Todo enemigo que realice un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} contra la barricada debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g}. Si falla, el enemigo sufre <u>(daño infligido a la barricada / 3)</u> de {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}daño perforante{/g}.
languages.original_text: Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Todo enemigo que realice un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} contra la barricada debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g}. languages.text: Ein Gegner, der einen {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g} auf die barrikade ausführt, muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} bestehen. Misslingt die Probe, erleidet der Gegner <u>(Schaden gegen die Barrikade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}Durchdringungsschaden{/g}.
languages.original_text: Any enemy that makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against the barricade must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g}. On fail, that enemy suffers <u>(damage dealt to the barricade / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}piercing damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Ein Gegner, der einen {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g} auf die barrikade ausführt, muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} bestehen. languages.text: バリケードに対して{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}を行う敵は、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷性{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗力テスト{/g}に合格しなければなりません。失敗した場合、その敵は<u>(バリケードに与えたダメージ / 3)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:PiercingDamage}貫通ダメージ{/g}を受けます。
